[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 01101111 6
1 11110110 6
2 10100110 4
3 11001010 4
4 01101001 4
5 11111110 7
6 11111101 7
7 01000100 2

01 10 00110000 2
12 21 00000000 a
23 32 01001000 2
34 43 01101000 3
45 54 11111100 6
56 65 01000100 2 match 7
67 76 00000000 a
70 07 10010010 3

02 20 10000010 2
13 31 00100000 1
24 42 11001010 4 match 3
35 53 01101001 4 match 4
46 64 01000100 2 match 7
57 75 10010000 2
60 06 00000000 a
71 17 00010000 1

03 30 00100000 1
14 41 00110100 3
25 52 11001000 3
36 63 01000000 1
47 74 10010010 3
50 05 10110000 3
61 16 00000100 1
72 27 10000010 2

04 40 10110010 4
15 51 00110100 3
26 62 01000000 1
37 73 00000000 a
[completion]

none

56 45x
